---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Nihao"
date: "2023-01-30"
output: html_document
---
# Lecuture testing testing

Text, including **apple is sucks** and _italian soups_

- hello world

Equations:
$$
\sum_{i=1}^n i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}
$$
add `monospace text`
```{r}
print("hello world")
```

First block:
```{r}
a = "hello world shit"
```


```{r}

print(a)
```


```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(a)
```


```{r, eval =FALSE}
a = "Introduction to Data Science"
```

```{r}
print(a)
```


```{r}
set.seed(240)    #
xs= rnorm(10000000) #10000 random numbers
hist(xs, breaks =20)
```

# resolution is not good tho

```{r, dpi=600, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
hist(xs, breaks = 20)
```


.center[
```{r, out.width = "50%", echo=FALSE}
library(knitr)
include_graphics("Miro.png")
```
]
